mapper.sql: feedback_id, company_id, user_id, subject, content, status, resolved_at, resolved_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM feedbacks ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedbacks (feedback_id, company_id, user_id, subject, content, status, resolved_at, resolved_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{feedbackId}, #{companyId}, #{userId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{status}, #{resolvedAt}, #{resolvedBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
